title: QC Requirement
description: A layered (check, variable, experiment) assignment tuple with requirement class

check.description: Must match a check id in the checks catalogue

variable.description: CMOR variable name(s), or * for all variables

experiment.description: Experiment id(s), or * for all experiments

requirement_class.description: Applicability class for the assignment: required = must pass; optional = run but non-blocking; proposed = under discussion; wont-fix = acknowledged but will not be implemented; not-applicable = explicitly excluded

status.description: Current execution result for this assignment, when known

issue.description: GitHub Issue number where this requirement was requested
